description_long: This is a young adult male with a slim build, dressed in a casual urban outfit. He wears a short-sleeved shirt with a striking, abstract pattern over a long-sleeved undershirt, paired with fitted pants and sturdy, high-ankle boots. His hair is styled in a long, straight ponytail that extends down his back, adding a distinctive flair to his appearance. The figure's posture is relaxed, with arms resting naturally at his sides and a slight forward tilt of the head. Visible accessories include a strap or holster attached to his right thigh, suggesting a utilitarian or streetwise style. The overall look is modern and suitable for a contemporary city environment.
description: A slim young adult male in a casual, modern outfit with a long ponytail and sturdy boots, exuding a streetwise urban style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the facial features, layered shirt, and relaxed arm posture.
description_view_1: Three-quarter left view highlighting the side profile, visible holster on the thigh, and the start of the long ponytail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the ponytail, back of the shirt, and both boots.
description_view_3: Three-quarter right view emphasizing the ponytail's flow, side of the boots, and the holster detail.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt over a long-sleeved undershirt, fitted pants, and high-ankle boots with a thigh holster accessory
